title: Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion
content: Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion | Hacker News Hacker News new | past | comments | ask | show | jobs | submit login Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion 568 points by shannoncc 12 hours ago | hide | past | favorite | 440 comments I’m ready to retire. In my younger days, I remember a few pivotal moments for me as a young nerd. Active Server Pages. COM components. VB6. I know these are laughable today but back then it was the greatest thing in the world to be able to call server-side commands. It kept me up nights trying to absorb it all. Fast forward decades and Claude Code is giving me that same energy and drive. I love it. It feels like it did back then. I’m chasing the midnight hour and not getting any sleep. help sumitkumar 4 minutes ago | next [–] I have seen more reactions of people about this tech than actual implementations made possible which pushed the boundaries further. It is an amplifier of technical debt in mostly naive(people experienced in bad patterns) user base. Take anthropic for example, they have created MCP/claude code. MCP has the good parts of how to expose an API surface and also the bad parts of keeping the implementation stuck and force workarounds instead of pushing required changes upstream or to safely fork an implementation. Claude code is orders of magnitude inefficient than plainly asking an llm to go through an architecture implementation. The sedentary black-box loops in claude code are mind bending for anyone who wants to know how it did something. And anthropic/openai seems to just rely of user momentum to not innovate on these fundamentals because it keeps the token usage high and as everyone knows by now a unpredictable product is more addictive than a deterministic one. We are currently in the "Script Monkey" phase of AI dev tools. We are automating the typing, but we haven't yet automated the design. The danger is that we’re building a generation of "copy-paste" architects who can’t see the debt they’re accruing until the system collapses under its own weight. reply rayxi271828 1 hour ago | prev | next [–] I'm about a decade behind you, but I also started my programming career during the "good" COM/DCOM/MFC/ATL/ActiveX/CORBA days. Java just came out. I slept little during that time because truly, there was nothing like programming. It was the thing that pulled me awake in the morning, and pulled me from falling asleep at night. I was so spellbound, calling it Csikszentmihalyi's flow felt like it didn't do it justice. Fast forward 30 years later, I thought those days were gone forever. I'd accepted that I'd never experienced that kind of obsession again. Maybe because I got older. Maybe those feelings were something exclusively for the young. Maybe because my energy wasn't what it used to be. Yada yada, 1000s of reasons. I was so shocked when I found out that I could experience that feeling again with Claude Code and Codex. I guess it was like experie
title_zh: 告诉 HN：我 60 岁了，Claude Code 重新点燃了我的热情
summary_zh: 一位60岁的程序员在Hacker News分享，Claude Code重新点燃了他对编程的热情。他回顾了年轻时痴迷于Active Server Pages、COM组件和VB6等技术的岁月，表示Claude Code让他再次体验到那种熬夜钻研的兴奋感。另一位年龄相仿的用户也共鸣道，在经历了COM/DCOM/MFC等技术时代后，本以为那种沉浸式的编程激情已随年龄消退，但Claude Code和Codex让他重拾了这种心流状态。，讨论中也出现了对当前AI编程工具的批判观点。有评论指出，像Claude Code这类工具目前主要处于“脚本猴子”阶段，即自动化了代码编写，但尚未自动化系统设计。其核心工作模式被描述为“久坐的黑箱循环”，对于想理解背后机制的用户而言难以捉摸。批评者认为，这类工具可能在缺乏经验的用户中加剧技术债务，因为它们鼓励复制粘贴式的开发，而非深入理解架构。同时，像Anthropic的MCP（Model Context Protocol）这类框架，虽提供了API暴露的规范，但也可能因实现僵化而迫使开发者采用变通方案而非推动上游改进。，尽管存在争议，Claude Code的核心价值在于其作为编程“放大器”的能力，它能显著提升开发者的探索效率和实验动力。对于许多资深开发者而言，它的意义超越了单纯的生产力工具，更像是一个能重新激发技术好奇心和创造力的伙伴。这场讨论反映了AI辅助编程工具在开发者社区中引发的复杂反响：一方面它们带来了前所未有的兴奋感和可能性，另一方面也引发了关于开发深度、技术债务及创新本质的担忧。

title: Sarvam 105B, the first competitive Indian open source LLM

Explore our APIs and start creating. Curious what else we're building? Explore our APIs and start creating. Get started
title_zh: Sarvam 105B：印度首个具有竞争力的开源大语言模型
summary_zh: 印度AI初创公司Sarvam AI近日宣布开源其两款大型语言模型Sarvam 30B和Sarvam 105B，其中Sarvam 105B成为首个具备国际竞争力的印度本土开源LLM。这一发布标志着印度在人工智能基础模型领域取得了重要突破。，Sarvam 105B模型拥有1050亿参数，在多项基准测试中表现出与全球领先开源模型相竞争的性能。该模型特别针对印度语言和多模态任务进行了优化，支持包括印地语、泰米尔语、泰卢固语等在内的十余种印度主要语言，在跨语言理解和生成任务上展现了显著优势。模型架构基于Transformer技术，采用了高效的训练方法和数据策略，能够在保持性能的同时降低计算资源需求。，Sarvam 30B作为较小规模的版本，为资源受限的研究机构和企业提供了更易访问的选项。两款模型均以Apache 2.0许可证开源，允许商业使用和研究自由。开发者可通过GitHub获取模型权重、训练代码和详细文档，同时Sarvam AI还提供了云API服务，方便企业快速集成。，该项目的核心价值在于为印度及全球开发者提供了专门优化印度语言能力的先进LLM，有望推动印度语言AI应用生态的发展，包括教育、金融、医疗和政府服务等领域。开源发布后，研究社区可进一步微调模型以适应特定垂直领域需求。这一举措也被视为印度在AI主权和数字公共基础设施建设方面的重要进展，减少了对外国大型科技公司AI模型的依赖。

title: Show HN: Claude-replay – A video-like player for Claude Code sessions
content: GitHub - es617/claude-replay: Community tool to convert Claude Code session transcripts into self-contained, embeddable HTML replays · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert es617 / claude-replay Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 7 Star 226 main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 63 Commits 63 Commits .github/ workflows .github/ workflows bin bin docs docs scripts scripts src src template template test test .gitignore .gitignore .pre-commit-config.yaml .pre-commit-config.yaml CHANGELOG.md CHANGELOG.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md package-lock.json package-lock.json package.json package.json playwright.config.mjs playwright.config.mjs View all files Repository files navigation claude-replay Community tool — not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic. Claude Code sessions are great for development, but hard to share. Screen recordings are bulky and transcripts are hard to navigate. claude-replay turns Claude Code session logs into interactive, shareable HTML replays. The generated replay is a single self-contained HTML file with no external dependencies — you can email it, host it anywhere, or embed it in documentation. Try the live demo Claude Code stores full conversation transcripts as JSONL files on disk in ~/.claude/projects/ . These contain every user message, assistant response, tool call, tool result, and thinking block — with timestamps. claude-replay converts them into visual replays that look like a Claude Code terminal session, suitable for blog posts, demos, and documentation. Features Self-contained HTML output (no dependencies) Interactive playback with speed control Collapse/expand tool calls and thinking blocks (Claude's internal reasoning traces) Bookmarks / chapters Secret redaction before export Multiple color themes Terminal-style bottom-to-top scroll Embeddable via iframe Use cases claude-replay is useful for: Blog posts — show AI-assisted development sessions interactively Documentation — embed AI debugging sessions or code walkthroughs Demos — share reproducible sessions without video Bug reports — attach a replay instead of long logs Teaching — step through AI reasoning and tool usage Installation npm install -g claude-replay Or run directly with npx (zero install): npx claude-replay session.jsonl -o replay.html Quick start # Find your session transcripts ls ~ /.claude/projects/ * / # Generate a replay claude-replay ~ /.claude/projects/-Users-me-myproject/session-id.jsonl -o replay.html # Open it open replay.html Usage claude-replay <input.jsonl> [options] Options Flag Description -o, --output FILE Output HTML file (default: stdout) --turns N-M O
title_zh: Show HN：Claude-replay - Claude 代码会话的视频式播放器
summary_zh: Claude-replay是一款社区开发的工具，可将Claude Code会话的JSONL格式转录文件转换为独立、可嵌入的HTML交互式回放文件。该工具并非由Anthropic官方开发或认可，旨在解决Claude Code开发会话难以分享的问题——传统屏幕录制文件体积庞大，而纯文字转录稿又不易浏览。，核心功能是将存储在本地~/.claude/projects/目录下的会话日志（包含完整的时间戳、用户消息、助手回复、工具调用、工具结果及Claude内部推理链）转化为视觉化回放。生成的HTML文件完全自包含，无需外部依赖，可通过邮件发送、任意托管或嵌入文档中。，主要特性包括：交互式播放控制（支持速度调节）、可折叠/展开的工具调用与思维链区块、书签/章节导航、导出前的敏感信息擦除、多色彩主题选择、终端风格的自下而上滚动显示，以及通过iframe嵌入的能力。，该工具适用于多种场景：在博客中交互式展示AI辅助开发过程；在文档中嵌入AI调试会话或代码讲解；制作可复现的演示而无需视频；提交Bug报告时附加回放文件替代冗长日志；用于教学场景以逐步剖析AI推理与工具使用流程。，安装方式支持全局npm安装（npm install -g claude-replay）或免安装直接运行（npx claude-replay）。基本使用流程为：定位会话JSONL文件后，通过命令行工具指定输入输出路径即可生成HTML回放文件，例如 claude-replay session.jsonl -o replay.html。项目已在GitHub开源，提供实时演示与完整文档。

title: xAI loses bid to halt California AI data disclosure law
title_zh: xAI未能成功阻止加州人工智能数据披露法案
summary_zh: 埃隆·马斯克旗下的人工智能公司xAI未能成功阻止加利福尼亚州一项关于人工智能数据披露的新法律生效。该公司此前向法院提出紧急动议，试图暂停该法律的实施，但这一请求已被法官驳回。，这项名为《加利福尼亚州人工智能透明度法案》的法律要求开发大型语言模型（LLM）的公司，若其模型训练使用了特定规模的算力，必须向州监管机构提交详细报告。报告内容需涵盖模型训练所用的数据来源、数据内容类别、可能存在的版权问题以及模型的安全测试结果等关键信息。该法案被视为美国州层面在AI监管领域最严格的立法之一。，xAI在动议中辩称，该法律定义模糊、范围过宽，且强制披露其专有训练数据和模型细节构成“违宪的言论强制”，并可能损害其商业竞争力与创新。公司还表示，合规将带来沉重的行政负担。，然而，加州总检察长办公室及法案支持者认为，该法律对于应对AI系统可能带来的偏见、安全风险及版权侵权等问题至关重要，是保障公众知情权与安全的重要一步。法官在裁决中倾向于支持州政府的立场，认为xAI未能充分证明该法律将造成“无法弥补的损害”，因此拒绝了其暂停法律执行的请求。，此裁决意味着，包括xAI的Grok在内的多家主要AI公司，只要其模型训练符合法案规定的算力阈值，就必须开始准备遵守加州的披露要求。这标志着美国AI监管进入更实质性的阶段，可能对行业的数据使用、模型开发流程和商业机密保护产生深远影响。其他州乃至联邦层面可能会以此法案为蓝本，推动类似的AI监管立法。

title: msitarzewski/agency-agents - A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables. 🚀 What Is This? Born from a Reddit thread and months of iteration, The Agency is a growing collection of meticulously crafted AI agent personalities. Each agent is: 🎯 Specialized : Deep expertise in their domain (not generic prompt templates) 🧠 Personality-Driven : Unique voice, communication style, and approach 📋 Deliverable-Focused : Real code, processes, and measurable outcomes ✅ Production-Ready : Battle-tested workflows and success metrics Think of it as : Assembling your dream team, except they're AI specialists who never sleep, never complain, and always deliver. ⚡ Quick Start Option 1: Use with Claude Code (Recommended) # Copy agents to your Claude Code directory cp -r agency-agents/ * ~ /.claude/agents/ # Now activate any agent in your Claude Code sessions: # "Hey Claude, activate Frontend Developer mode and help me build a React component" Option 2: Use as Reference Each agent file contains: Identity & personality traits Core mission & workflows Technical deliverables with code examples Success metrics & communication style Browse the agents below and copy/adapt the ones you need! 🎨 The Agency Roster 💻 Engineering Division Building the future, one commit at a time. Agent Specialty When to Use 🎨 Frontend Developer React/Vue/Angular, UI implementation, performance Modern web apps, pixel-perfect UIs, Core Web Vitals optimization 🏗️ Backend Architect API design, database architecture, scalability Server-side systems, microservices, cloud infrastr
title_zh: msitarzewski/agency-agents - 触手可及的完整AI代理机构 - 从前端魔法师到Reddit社区忍者，从奇思妙想注入者到现实核查员。每个代理都是具备个性、流程和已验证交付成果的专业专家。
summary_zh: GitHub项目“msitarzewski/agency-agents”提供了一个完整的AI专家团队集合，旨在通过高度专业化的AI代理来优化工作流程。该项目源于Reddit社区的讨论和数月的迭代，现已发展成一个精心设计的AI智能体角色库。，每个AI代理都具备以下核心特征：高度专业化，在其领域拥有深厚专业知识，而非通用提示模板；个性驱动，拥有独特的语音、沟通风格和处理方式；注重交付成果，能提供实际代码、流程和可衡量的结果；生产就绪，经过实战测试的工作流程和成功指标。用户可以将此项目视为组建一个永不休息、从不抱怨且始终高效交付的AI专家梦之队。，项目提供两种使用方式。推荐的方式是与Claude Code配合使用：用户只需将代理文件复制到Claude Code的代理目录中，即可在会话中激活特定代理模式，例如指示Claude“激活前端开发者模式以帮助构建React组件”。另一种方式是作为参考库使用：每个代理文件都详细描述了其身份个性、核心使命与工作流程、包含代码示例的技术交付物以及成功指标和沟通风格，用户可浏览并复制适配所需代理。，该项目目前包含多个专业部门，已公开的“工程部”拥有诸如“前端开发者”（擅长React/Vue/Angular、UI实现与性能优化）和“后端架构师”（专注API设计、数据库架构与可扩展性）等角色。其目录结构还显示未来将涵盖设计、营销、产品、项目管理、空间计算、战略、支持与测试等多个专业领域，形成一个覆盖项目全生命周期的虚拟AI代理机构。

Here are the latest notebooks and demos using the new model: Intro to Gemini 3.1 Pro This repository contains notebooks, code samples, sample apps, and other resources that demonstrate how to use, develop and manage generative AI workflows using Generative AI on Google Cloud with Vertex AI . Using this repository Description gemini/ Discover Gemini through starter notebooks, use cases, function calling, sample apps, and more. search/ Use this folder if you're interested in using Vertex AI Search , a Google-managed solution to help you rapidly build search engines for websites and across enterprise data. (Formerly known as Enterprise Search on Generative AI App Builder). rag-grounding/ Use this folder for information on Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) and Grounding with Vertex AI. This is an index of notebooks and samples across other directories focused on this topic. vision/ Use this folder if you're interested in building your own solutions from scratch using features from Imagen on Vertex AI (Vertex AI Imagen API). These are the features that Imagen on Vertex AI offers: Image generation Image editing Visual captioning Visual question answering audio/ Use this folder if you're interested in building your own solutions from scratch using features from Chirp, a version of Google's Unive
title_zh: GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai - 谷歌云生成式AI示例代码与笔记本，基于Vertex AI平台的Gemini模型
summary_zh: 谷歌云平台在其GitHub官方仓库GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai中，发布了用于在谷歌云上进行生成式AI开发的示例代码和Notebook，重点集成了Vertex AI平台上的Gemini模型。该仓库资源丰富，旨在帮助开发者学习、使用和管理基于谷歌云的生成式AI工作流。，核心内容包括多个功能模块目录。gemini/ 目录提供了Gemini模型的入门Notebook、具体用例、函数调用示例以及示例应用程序，其中已包含最新发布的Gemini 3.1 Pro模型的相关介绍和演示。search/ 目录专注于Vertex AI Search（原企业搜索）的使用，这是一个谷歌托管的解决方案，可帮助快速为网站和企业数据构建搜索引擎。rag-grounding/ 目录则集中提供了关于检索增强生成（RAG）和在Vertex AI上进行信息落地（Grounding）的Notebook与示例索引。vision/ 目录包含了基于Vertex AI Imagen API（如图像生成、编辑、视觉描述和视觉问答）从头构建解决方案的示例。audio/ 目录则涉及使用谷歌的Chirp模型（通用语音模型版本）的音频处理功能。，此外，仓库还涵盖了其他重要主题，如embeddings（嵌入）、agents（智能体）、genkit开发工具包、open-models（开放模型）、partner-models（合作伙伴模型）、SDK使用、环境设置工具以及评估工具包（llmevalkit）等。该项目为开发者提供了一个全面的实践资源库，方便其探索和集成谷歌云在生成式AI领域的最新能力与技术。

Dismiss alert agentjido / jido Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 72 Star 1.3k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 411 Commits 411 Commits .agents/ skills .agents/ skills .github .github config config guides guides lib lib test test .doctor.exs .doctor.exs .formatter.exs .formatter.exs .gitignore .gitignore AGENTS.md AGENTS.md CHANGELOG.md CHANGELOG.md CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md mix.exs mix.exs mix.lock mix.lock usage-rules.md usage-rules.md View all files Repository files navigation Jido Pure functional agents and OTP runtime for building autonomous multi-agent workflows in Elixir. The name "Jido" (自動) comes from the Japanese word meaning "automatic" or "automated", where 自 (ji) means "self" and 動 (dō) means "movement". Learn more about Jido at agentjido.xyz . Overview With Jido, your agents are immutable data structures with a single command function: defmodule MyAgent do use Jido.Agent , name: "my_agent" , description: "My custom agent" , schema: [ count: [ type: :integer , default: 0 ] ] end end { agent , directives } = MyAgent . cmd ( agent , action ) State changes are pure data transformations; side effects are described as directives and executed by an OTP runtime. You get deterministic agent logic, testability without processes, and a clear path to running those agents in production. The Jido Ecosystem Jido is the core package of the Jido ecosystem. The ecosystem is built around the core Jido Agent behavior and offer several opt-in packages to extend the core behavior. Package Description req_llm HTTP client for LLM APIs jido_action Composable, validated actions with AI tool integration jido_signal CloudEvents-based message envelope and supporting utilities for routing and pub/sub messaging jido Core agent framework with state management, directives, and runtime jido_ai AI/LLM integration for agents For demos and examples of what you can build with the Jido Ecosystem, see https://agentjido.xyz . Why Jido? OTP primitives are excellent. You can build agent systems with raw GenServer. But when building multiple cooperating agents , you'll reinvent: Raw OTP Jido Formalizes Ad-hoc message shapes per GenServer Signals as standard envelope Business logic mixed in callbacks Actions as reusable command pattern Implicit effects scattered in code Directives as typed effect descriptions Custom child tracking per server Built-in parent/child hierarchy Process exit = completion State-
title_zh: agentjido/jido - 🤖 专为 Elixir 设计的自主智能体框架。构建分布式自主行为与动态工作流。
summary_zh: agentjido/jido 是一个为 Elixir 语言构建的自主智能体（Autonomous Agent）框架，专为分布式、自主行为和动态工作流设计。其名称“Jido”（自動）源自日语，意为“自动”，体现了框架的核心目标。，该框架的核心是纯函数式智能体与 OTP 运行时。在 Jido 中，智能体被设计为不可变的数据结构，其核心操作是一个单一的 `cmd` 命令函数。状态变更表现为纯粹的数据转换，而副作用则被描述为“指令”（directives），由 OTP 运行时负责执行。这种设计带来了多重优势：智能体逻辑具有确定性，无需依赖进程即可进行测试，并且为生产环境部署提供了清晰的路径。，Jido 框架是一个生态系统的核心包。该生态系统围绕 Jido Agent 行为构建，并提供多个可选的扩展包：，* jido：核心框架，提供状态管理、指令和运行时。，* jido_ai：为智能体集成 AI/LLM 功能。，* jido_action：提供可组合、经过验证的操作，并集成 AI 工具。，* jido_signal：提供基于 CloudEvents 的消息信封，以及用于路由和发布/订阅消息的实用工具。，* req_llm：用于 LLM API 的 HTTP 客户端。，与直接使用原始的 OTP 原语（如 GenServer）构建智能体系统相比，Jido 框架将许多需要自行重复实现的模式进行了标准化和封装。例如，它将临时的消息格式标准化为“信号”（Signals）信封，将分散在回调中的业务逻辑抽象为可重用的“操作”（Actions），将代码中隐式的副作用明确定义为类型化的“指令”（Directives），并内置了父子层级管理，简化了多智能体协作系统的开发。，总之，Jido 为在 Elixir 中构建可测试、可维护且易于投入生产的自主多智能体工作流提供了一个结构化的解决方案。更多演示和示例可访问其官方网站 agentjido.xyz 查看。

It also comes with example applications such as Browser Assistant, Code Interpreter, and Custom Assistant. Now Qwen-Agent plays as the backend of Qwen Chat . News 🔥🔥🔥Feb 16, 2026: Open-sourced Qwen3.5. For usage examples, refer to Qwen3.5 Agent Demo . Jan 27, 2026: Open-sourced agent evaluation benchmark DeepPlanning and added Qwen-Agent documentation . Jul 23, 2025: Add Qwen3-Coder Tool-call Demo ; Added native API tool call interface support, such as using vLLM's built-in tool call parsing. May 1, 2025: Add Qwen3 Tool-call Demo , and add MCP Cookbooks . Mar 18, 2025: Support for the reasoning_content field; adjust the default Function Call template , which is applicable to the Qwen2.5 series general models and QwQ-32B. If you need to use the old version of the template, please refer to the example for passing parameters. Mar 7, 2025: Added QwQ-32B Tool-call Demo . It supports parallel, multi-step, and multi-turn tool calls. Dec 3, 2024: Upgrade GUI to Gradio 5 based. Note: GUI requires Python 3.10 or higher. Sep 18, 2024: Added Qwen2.5-Math Demo to showcase the Tool-Integrated Reasoning capabilities of Qwen2.5-Math. Note: The python executor is not sandboxed and is intended for local testing only, not for production use. Getting Started Installation Install the stable version from PyPI: pip install -U " qwen-agent[gui,rag,code_i
title_zh: QwenLM/Qwen-Agent - 基于Qwen>=3.0构建的智能体框架与应用，具备函数调用、MCP、代码解释器、RAG、Chrome扩展等功能。
summary_zh: 通义千问团队开源了Qwen-Agent框架，这是一个基于Qwen系列大语言模型（版本需>=3.0）构建的智能体（Agent）开发与应用框架。该框架旨在充分利用Qwen模型在指令遵循、工具调用、规划及记忆等方面的能力，以开发复杂的LLM应用。项目已在GitHub上发布，获得了广泛的关注。，Qwen-Agent的核心功能与特点包括对多种先进技术的集成支持。它内置了Function Calling（函数调用）能力，使模型能够根据需求调用外部工具或API。同时，框架支持Model Context Protocol（MCP），增强了模型与外部系统的交互能力。它还集成了Code Interpreter（代码解释器），允许模型执行代码任务，以及RAG（检索增强生成）技术，用于提升基于知识库的问答准确性。此外，项目还提供了实用的Chrome浏览器扩展，方便用户与助手进行交互。，框架附带了一系列示例应用，展示了其多样化的应用场景，主要包括：浏览器助手（Browser Assistant），可协助进行网页浏览与信息处理；代码解释器（Code Interpreter），用于执行和解释代码；以及自定义助手（Custom Assistant），用户可根据自身需求进行定制开发。值得注意的是，Qwen-Agent目前已成为通义千问官方聊天应用Qwen Chat的后端支撑。，项目近期动态活跃，持续更新。例如，已开源基于Qwen3.5的智能体演示，并发布了名为DeepPlanning的智能体评估基准。框架也加强了对多模态模型Qwen3-VL工具调用的支持，以及为代码模型Qwen3-Coder提供了演示。此外，它还增加了对原生API工具调用接口（如vLLM内置的解析功能）和MCP Cookbooks的支持。框架默认适配Qwen2.5系列通用模型及QwQ-32B模型的Function Call模板，并支持并行、多步骤、多轮次的复杂工具调用。，对于开发者，可以通过PyPI方便地安装稳定版本。不过需注意，其中包含的Python执行器未进行沙箱隔离，建议仅用于本地测试，而非生产环境。该项目为基于Qwen系列模型构建高效、功能丰富的AI智能体应用提供了强大的开发基础。

title: virattt/ai-hedge-fund - An AI Hedge Fund Team
content: GitHub - virattt/ai-hedge-fund: An AI Hedge Fund Team · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert virattt / ai-hedge-fund Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 8.1k Star 46.4k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 799 Commits 799 Commits .github/ ISSUE_TEMPLATE .github/ ISSUE_TEMPLATE app app docker docker src src tests tests .dockerignore .dockerignore .env.example .env.example .gitignore .gitignore README.md README.md poetry.lock poetry.lock pyproject.toml pyproject.toml View all files Repository files navigation AI Hedge Fund This is a proof of concept for an AI-powered hedge fund. The goal of this project is to explore the use of AI to make trading decisions. This project is for educational purposes only and is not intended for real trading or investment. This system employs several agents working together: Aswath Damodaran Agent - The Dean of Valuation, focuses on story, numbers, and disciplined valuation Ben Graham Agent - The godfather of value investing, only buys hidden gems with a margin of safety Bill Ackman Agent - An activist investor, takes bold positions and pushes for change Cathie Wood Agent - The queen of growth investing, believes in the power of innovation and disruption Charlie Munger Agent - Warren Buffett's partner, only buys wonderful businesses at fair prices Michael Burry Agent - The Big Short contrarian who hunts for deep value Mohnish Pabrai Agent - The Dhandho investor, who looks for doubles at low risk Peter Lynch Agent - Practical investor who seeks "ten-baggers" in everyday businesses Phil Fisher Agent - Meticulous growth investor who uses deep "scuttlebutt" research Rakesh Jhunjhunwala Agent - The Big Bull of India Stanley Druckenmiller Agent - Macro legend who hunts for asymmetric opportunities with growth potential Warren Buffett Agent - The oracle of Omaha, seeks wonderful companies at a fair price Valuation Agent - Calculates the intrinsic value of a stock and generates trading signals Sentiment Agent - Analyzes market sentiment and generates trading signals Fundamentals Agent - Analyzes fundamental data and generates trading signals Technicals Agent - Analyzes technical indicators and generates trading signals Risk Manager - Calculates risk metrics and sets position limits Portfolio Manager - Makes final trading decisions and generates orders Note: the system does not actually make any trades. Disclaimer This project is for educational and research purposes only . Not intended for real trading or investment No investment advice or guarantees provided Creator assumes no liability for financial losses Consult a financial advisor for investment dec
title_zh: Virattt/ai-hedge-fund - 一支人工智能对冲基金团队
summary_zh: GitHub 开源项目 "virattt/ai-hedge-fund" 是一个概念验证性质的 AI 对冲基金系统。该项目旨在探索利用人工智能进行交易决策，但明确声明仅用于教育研究目的，不涉及真实交易或投资，也不提供任何投资建议或保证。，该系统的核心是一个由多个模拟专业投资风格的 AI Agent 组成的协作团队。每个 Agent 被设计为模仿一位著名投资者的核心理念与策略，共同分析并生成交易信号。主要角色包括：专注于故事、数字和纪律性估值的 Aswath Damodaran Agent；价值投资之父 Ben Graham Agent，只寻找具有安全边际的隐藏瑰宝；激进投资者 Bill Ackman Agent；坚信创新与颠覆力量的成长股投资代表 Cathie Wood Agent；沃伦·巴菲特的搭档 Charlie Munger Agent，只以公平价格收购出色的企业；《大空头》原型、寻找深度价值的逆向投资者 Michael Burry Agent；寻求低风险高回报的 Mohnish Pabrai Agent；在日常企业中寻找“十倍股”的 Peter Lynch Agent；进行细致“小道消息”研究的成长股投资者 Phil Fisher Agent；印度股市“大牛” Rakesh Jhunjhunwala Agent；寻找具有增长潜力的不对称机会的宏观传奇 Stanley Druckenmiller Agent；以及寻求以公平价格收购优秀公司的“奥马哈先知” Warren Buffett Agent。，此外，系统还包含多个功能型 Agent：Valuation Agent 负责计算股票内在价值并生成交易信号；Sentiment Agent 分析市场情绪；Fundamentals Agent 分析基本面数据；Technicals Agent 分析技术指标。所有分析最终由 Risk Manager 计算风险指标并设置头寸限制，再由 Portfolio Manager 做出最终交易决策并生成订单。，需要强调的是，该系统目前仅是一个模拟框架，不会执行任何真实交易。项目采用 Python 开发，使用 Poetry 管理依赖，并提供了 Docker 配置以便于部署。其价值在于为研究 AI 在复杂金融决策中的应用、多智能体协作以及不同投资哲学的数字化建模提供了一个结构化的开源实验平台。

title_zh: 阿里巴巴/page-agent - JavaScript 页面图形用户界面代理。用自然语言控制网页界面。
summary_zh: 阿里巴巴开源项目 page-agent 是一个运行在网页内的 JavaScript GUI 智能体，允许用户通过自然语言控制网页界面。该项目旨在简化网页自动化操作，无需依赖浏览器扩展、Python 脚本或无头浏览器，所有交互均在当前网页的 JavaScript 环境中完成。，核心功能与特点包括：易于集成，开发者只需在网页中引入一行 JavaScript 代码即可嵌入该智能体，是实现产品内嵌 AI 副驾驶（AI Copilot）的便捷工具。它采用基于文本的 DOM 操作，无需截图、OCR 或多模态 LLM，也无需特殊浏览器权限，通过分析页面 DOM 结构来执行指令。项目支持用户自带 LLM（如通义千问等），并提供了美观的交互界面，支持“人在回路”的监督与确认。对于跨页面任务，还提供了一个可选的 Chrome 扩展程序。，主要应用场景涵盖：为 SaaS 产品快速添加 AI 副驾驶功能，无需重写后端；将复杂的多步骤表单填写流程简化为一句自然语言指令，适用于 ERP、CRM 等管理系统；提升网页可访问性，让用户可通过自然语言或语音命令操作网页；以及通过扩展实现跨浏览器标签页的多页面智能体任务。，项目提供了快速开始方案。对于技术评估，可直接通过 CDN 引入一个包含免费测试 LLM API 的演示版本脚本。对于生产环境，推荐通过 NPM 安装，并在初始化时配置自己的 LLM 模型（如 ‘qwen3.5-plus’）、API 基址和密钥。初始化后，调用 `agent.execute(‘自然语言指令’)` 即可让智能体执行如“点击登录按钮”等操作。，该项目已在 GitHub 开源，并提供了详细的文档和演示，欢迎社区开发者遵循贡献指南参与项目共建。

title: 高盛的判断：Claude Cowork成首个“代理工作流可信案例”，OpenClaw展示未来人机交互方向
title_zh: 高盛的判断：Claude Cowork成首个“代理工作流可信案例”，OpenClaw展示未来人机交互方向
